title: What an american thinks about germany - bike touring

transcript.text: Um hello I'm having breakfast here I figured I would experiment with killing

Think something like nine days I rode my bicycle from pretty much the end of the

Eastern Netherlands the Rhine just turns into all of those canals in the

Is bad and you always have to go off on all the intersections that are all over the
Place you have to like veer way off to the side and it's a lot faster you can get
Into a rhythm better if you just ride on the road even though it pisses cars off
Cars like honk at you and trying to get you to get back on the bike path but it's
Like cars in Germany are very very very respectful of bikers they yield to you a
Lot they don't seem to be in a rush they give you plenty of room and they don't
